0.text: Mild peribronchial wall thickening in the basal segment of the right lower lobe

1.text: Subpleural mild ground-glass opacity in the basal segment of the right lower lobe

2.text: Stable nonspecific nodules measuring 2-3 mm in the subpleural region of the right middle lobe

3.text: Decreased tree-in-bud appearance in the lower lobes of both lungs
